benchmark_honesty_caveat: This is not an autonomous selector result. It is a manually selected, Lean-checked proof-ingredient pack used to test whether generation succeeds once the right local and Mathlib facts are present.
proof_strategy_note: Use the same-file helper e_eq_sum_prod_subsets to rewrite e_n as a sum over powersetCard n univ. For each summand index s, mem_powersetCard gives s ⊆ univ and #s = n. Finset.card_le_card plus Fintype.card_fin gives #s ≤ N, contradicting N < n. Then Finset.sum_eq_zero closes the sum.

checked_signatures.name: AlgebraicCombinatorics.SymmetricPolynomials.e_eq_sum_prod_subsets
checked_signatures.signature: e_eq_sum_prod_subsets.{u_1} {K : Type u_1} [CommRing K] {N : ℕ} (n : ℕ) : e n = ∑ s ∈ powersetCard n univ, ∏ i ∈ s, X i

checked_signatures.name: Finset.sum_eq_zero
checked_signatures.signature: Finset.sum_eq_zero.{u_1, u_4} {ι : Type u_1} {M : Type u_4} {s : Finset ι} [AddCommMonoid M] {f : ι → M} (h : ∀ x ∈ s, f x = 0) : ∑ x ∈ s, f x = 0

checked_signatures.name: Finset.mem_powersetCard
checked_signatures.signature: Finset.mem_powersetCard.{u_1} {α : Type u_1} {n : ℕ} {s t : Finset α} : s ∈ powersetCard n t ↔ s ⊆ t ∧ #s = n

checked_signatures.name: Finset.card_le_card
checked_signatures.signature: Finset.card_le_card.{u_1} {α : Type u_1} {s t : Finset α} : s ⊆ t → #s ≤ #t

checked_signatures.name: Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
checked_signatures.signature: Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt {n m k : ℕ} (h₁ : n ≤ m) (h₂ : m < k) : n < k
